title: Wireless cluster based system for communication between sensor networks
abstract: The present invention relates to a wireless cluster based system for communication between sensor networks. Accordingly, the wireless cluster based system includes: a) at least one cluster module (200) having a repeater (300) in communication with at least one sensor unit (400) for measuring at least one parameter relating to the condition of an article; wherein the repeater (300) is adapted for sufficiently transmitting, storing, receiving, retrieving, accumulating, pairing, sharing and/or broadcasting data or other related information of the sensor unit (400) among at least one cluster module (200); and wherein at least one cluster module (200) is adapted to be either communicated or paired with any other cluster module(s) (200) or with a main controller (500) via the repeater (300).
claims: Claims A wireless cluster based system (100) for communication between sensor networks, the wireless cluster based system (100) includes: a) at least one cluster module (200) having a repeater (300) in communication with at least one sensor unit (400) for measuring at least one parameter relating to the condition of an article; wherein the repeater (300) is adapted for sufficiently transmitting, storing, receiving, retrieving, accumulating, pairing, sharing and/or broadcasting data or other related information of the sensor unit (400) among at least one cluster module (200); and wherein the at least one cluster module (200) is adapted to be either communicated or paired with any other cluster module(s) (200) or with a main controller (500) via the repeater (300). The wireless cluster based system according to Claim 1 , wherein the wireless communication between at least one cluster module (200), the repeater (300), at least one sensor unit (400), and the controller (500) is performed by using Bluetooth Technology, WiFi, near field communication (NFC), Zigbee, ANT+ or any other wireless or Radio Frequency (RF) connection. The wireless cluster based system according to Claim 1 , wherein the article is a vehicle such as a trailer, truck or lorry, or other moving object. The wireless cluster based system according to Claim 3, wherein at least one sensor unit (400) is disposed at each tire of the vehicle for measuring at least one parameter relating to the condition of the tire. 5. The wireless cluster based system according to Claim 4, wherein the parameter relating to the condition of the tire measured by the sensor unit (400) includes tire pressure, temperature, wheel speed, acceleration, and/or distance information of the vehicle. 6. The wireless cluster based system according to Claim 1 , wherein the cluster module (200) is adapted to be communicated or paired with other cluster module(s) (200) via the repeater (300), such that data and/or related information collected from the sensor units (400) are able to be retrieved from, transmitted to, shared or accumulated with any or all other cluster module(s) (200) that are in communication or are paired with each other. 7. The wireless cluster based system according to Claim 6, wherein the cluster modules (200) are able to communicate with the main controller (500), such that data and/or related information collected from the sensor units (400) or that have been received and accumulated from any or all other cluster module(s) (200) are able to be transmitted to or shared with the main controller (500). 8. The wireless cluster based system according to Claim 1 , wherein the main controller (500) is an in-car unit of a vehicle. 9. The wireless cluster based system according to Claim 1 , wherein the main controller (500) is adapted to be communicated or paired with a mobile device (600), such that data and/or related information collected from the sensor units are able to be transmitted to or shared with the mobile device (600). 10. The wireless cluster based system according to Claim 10, wherein the mobile device (600) is adapted to be communicated with a cloud or network server (700), such that data and/or related information collected from the sensor units are able to be transmitted to or stored in the cloud or network server (700).
